name: Sloppy Joe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic. Cook until translucent.
3. Add the mushrooms, carrot, and parsley. Stir fry briefly.
4. Add the tofu, tamari, and tomato sauce. Mix well.
5. Cook until everything is heated through.
6. Stuff the mixture into pita bread and serve.
